REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON OCT-17-2007. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON AUG-11-2008 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. TRIAL DATE CONDITIONALLY SET UPON PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION BEING COMPLETED WITHIN 45 DAYS. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON AUG-01-2008 AT 9:30 AM. KELLER 05 WD/MESO.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16745920) AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY

THE COURT, SUA SPONTE, VACATED THE CONSOLIDATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1048(A). THIS CASE REMAINS IN ITS CURRENT GROUPING, AND THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE IS MAINTAINED. THE COURT TO ISSUE MINUTE ORDER AND SAID ORDER WILL BE FILED IN CASE #444221 LUJAN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS. JUDGE ROBERTSON; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: J. LONG (220)
ASBESTOS MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. BOTH SIDES PRESENT. NO SETTLEMENT REACHED. TRIAL DATE REMAINS. NOT REPORTED. CLERK AUDREY HUIE, D-304.

MASTER JURY ASBESTOS CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-11-2008 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS ON FEB-09-2009 AT 11:15 AM IN 206 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. AT TRIAL CALL ON 8/11/08, CASE WAS SEVERED FROM KELLER FISHBACK & JACKSON GROUP 5 AND PLACED ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. (206)
